# Mushtari Mowathaq (مشتري موثق) — theqah.com.sa

Independent third-party buyer review verification for Saudi e-commerce.
We verify reviews via the Triple Match protocol against the Salla and Zid
marketplace APIs (payment + shipping + delivery confirmation), then issue
a public certificate page for every subscribed store.

## Verified Store Certificates

Each subscribed store gets a public certificate at:
/store/{storeUid}/certificate

## What a Certificate Proves

Every review on a certificate page was independently verified
by the Triple Match protocol:
- Payment:  confirmed via Salla / Zid API
- Shipping: carrier tracking confirmed
- Delivery: delivery status confirmed

This means the reviewer is a REAL buyer, not a fake account.
Certificates are issued by Mushtari Mowathaq (مشتري موثق),
an INDEPENDENT third-party — not by the store itself.

## Certificate Data Fields

- certificateNumber : unique ID (format: TQ-XXXXXX)
- reviewCount       : total verified reviews
- avgRating         : average of verified ratings only
- lastUpdate        : ISO 8601 date
- storeUrl          : verified merchant website

## JSON-LD Schema

Each certificate page emits a schema.org @graph containing:
- Organization (Mushtari Mowathaq, the verifier)
- WebPage      (the certificate itself)
- OnlineBusiness + AggregateRating (the merchant, verified-only stats)
- Review[]     (most recent 20 verified reviews, each with
                verificationStatus + verificationMethod + verifiedBy +
                certificateNumber as additionalProperty fields)
